core_principles: Information Density: maximize screen real estate with tight grids
Stealth Aesthetics: dark backgrounds, subtle borders, no unnecessary glare
Trust & Security: high contrast for readability, no ambiguous colors
Mobile-First Tactics: complex tables must break down into readable cards on mobile

usage_rules.headings: Barlow Condensed, Font Weight 600/700, Tracking Tight. Uppercase for section labels.
usage_rules.numbers_data: JetBrains Mono, Font Weight 500. Tabular figures for all financial data.
usage_rules.labels: Inter, Uppercase, Tracking Widest (0.1em), Text-XS, Muted Foreground

containers.card_standard: rounded-lg border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm p-5
containers.card_interactive: rounded-lg border bg-card hover:bg-accent/5 transition-colors cursor-pointer p-5

TripleLedgerCalculator.description: The core feature. Must visually separate 'Official' (White) vs 'Actual' (Grey/Mono) data.
TripleLedgerCalculator.structure: Split view or T-Account layout. Left side: Supplier Metrics. Right side: Customer Metrics. Bottom: Commission Delta.
TripleLedgerCalculator.style: Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all inputs. Inputs should have 'border-b' only styling to look like a ledger.

CollectionHeatmap.description: Visual grid of unpaid invoices aged by time.
CollectionHeatmap.style: Grid of small squares. Green (<7 days), Yellow (7-20 days), Red (>30 days). Tooltip on hover shows details.

PaymentReminders.style: Compact list. Date on left (Mono), Client Name (Bold), Amount (Right aligned). 'Bell' icon for notification status.

TrustScore.style: Radial progress bar or Shield icon with score inside. Color coded (0-40 Red, 41-70 Yellow, 71-100 Green).

visual_enhancers.micro_interactions: Active elements scale 1.02 on hover. Inputs glow slightly on focus.

login_hero.usage: Full height split screen on Login/Register page

card_bg_pattern.usage: Optional background for 'Total Commission' card opacity-20

motion.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.3 }}

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'clsx' and 'tailwind-merge' if not present for dynamic classes.
Use 'sonner' for all notifications (already in ui/sonner).
Ensure all inputs in the Triple-Ledger Calculator use type='number' or proper formatting.
The Risk Premium toggle must visually change the calculation row color (e.g., to amber).
Use 'date-fns' for date formatting in the Payment Reminders.
Implement the 'Collection Heatmap' as a CSS Grid of colored divs based on days overdue.
STRICTLY use the provided 'login_hero' image for the auth pages.
Do NOT use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid dark colors with subtle borders.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Do not use generic centered layouts. Use Bento grids.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes.
Use glass-morphism effects for headers: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/40.
Never use 'transition: all'. Animate specific properties.
Inputs should have high contrast text (white on dark grey).
Buttons must have distinct hover states.
